criteria.evidence: cd web-ui && pnpm lint → `Checked 23 files in 34ms. No fixes applied.` exit 0. Root shim edit web-ui/eslint.config.ts adds a file-scoped `no-restricted-globals: off` override for `src/mocks/__tests__/*.{ts,tsx}` only; `no-restricted-globals` is NOT in KNOWN_SENTINELS so the meta-invariant test_webui_invariants_wired.py is unaffected, and the override scope is the exact directory whose smoke test needs raw fetch to prove network-layer interception. Legitimate app-scope override, not an end-run around invariants.
cd web-ui && pnpm typecheck → `tsc --noEmit` exit 0 with no output.
cd web-ui && pnpm knip → exit 0. Output contains 7 configuration hints only (pre-existing ignore-list cleanups, unrelated to this feature); no unused files/exports/dependencies errors.

criteria.description: Prod bundle MUST tree-shake MSW out. Verify: `grep -rli 'mock-service-worker|msw' web-ui/dist/` returns no matches (or only the mockServiceWorker.js copy in dist/, which is a static asset not referenced by the bundle).
criteria.evidence: cd web-ui && pnpm build → vite built in 184ms, 156 modules, produced dist/assets/index-Cj36O6Vj.js (302.20 kB) + route chunks. Tree-shake probe: `grep -rli 'mock-service-worker\|msw' web-ui/dist/ | grep -v '^web-ui/dist/mockServiceWorker\.js$'` returned EMPTY (zero lines). dist/index.html references only `/assets/index-Cj36O6Vj.js`, `/assets/jsx-runtime-DAs1UGHr.js`, `/assets/index-ChEEJWLN.css`; no msw chunk is loaded.

criteria.description: Smoke test at web-ui/src/mocks/__tests__/handlers.test.ts: register an http.get handler for /api/__smoke, fetch it, assert the mocked body.
criteria.evidence: cd web-ui && pnpm test → `Test Files 1 passed (1)`, `Tests 1 passed (1)`, duration 413ms. Smoke test registers `http.get("http://localhost/api/__smoke", ...)` via server.use(), fetches it, and asserts `{ok:true, from:"msw"}` — proves handlers.ts + server.ts + test-setup.ts (listen/resetHandlers/close with onUnhandledRequest:"error") are correctly wired in Vitest node-mode.

criteria.description: Demonstrate the boundaries rule rejects a forbidden import: add a throwaway file under web-ui/src/ui/ that imports from src/mocks/ and confirm `pnpm lint` fails with the expected boundaries error; then remove the throwaway file.
criteria.evidence: Reconciled post-evaluation by the human orchestrator. The generator correctly deferred this criterion because web-ui/invariants/** is off-limits; the invariant edit landed in commit c381a8a per the splice-ready snippet in docs/plans/notes/frontend.mocks.setup.md (registered `mocks` element-type at src/mocks/**, extended main→allow.to.type, added mocks→{mocks,shared} rule). Throwaway file web-ui/src/ui/_forbidden_import_demo.tsx importing @/mocks/handlers was created, `pnpm lint` ran with exit=1, producing the expected error verbatim: `error There is no rule allowing dependencies from elements of type "ui" to elements of type "mocks"  boundaries/dependencies`. Throwaway file removed immediately after verification. Meta-invariant test_webui_invariants_wired.py still 6/6 pass; no KNOWN_SENTINELS rule touched.

notes: Original evaluator verdict at evaluated_at was overall=fail with the kind:invariant criterion correctly deferred-pending-planner. Reconciled by (a) the human orchestrator landing the invariant edit (commit c381a8a) per the splice-ready snippet the generator put in NOTES, and (b) an independent fix to apps/tests/invariants/test_webui_invariants_wired.py::_strip_line_comments (commit 992aede) that the generator flagged as a latent meta-invariant bug during its run. Feature is now fully green end-to-end. Harness-level observation: the evaluator correctly routed the deferred criterion to planner escalation without rubber-stamping or looping the generator — the skepticism + escalation doctrine held.
